---
layout: default
title: "Political Maneuvering and Judicial Interventions Ahead of Monsoon Session"
date: 2026-07-16T15:52:44.450600+00:00
summary: "Opposition parties prepare to challenge the government on key bills and issues as the Supreme Court intervenes in education, prison, and election policies"
run_time_ist: "9:22PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:22PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Supreme Court intervention:</strong> The Supreme Court has advised the Centre to reconsider the CBSE&#x27;s three-language policy to avoid student stress, while also directing states to establish early release policies for elderly and terminally ill prisoners.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>TMC leadership setback:</strong> Trinamool Congress faces a fresh political blow as Rajya Sabha MP Koel Mallick resigned from the Upper House, marking the fourth such departure from the party.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I34</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I39</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I47</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I50</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary opposition strategy:</strong> Ahead of the Monsoon Session, the Congress party is mobilizing to oppose the potential Delimitation Bill and raise concerns regarding the Ram Mandir donation row.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative and electoral disputes:</strong> The Lok Sabha has admitted a resolution opposing an ordinance to increase Supreme Court judges, while the Supreme Court dismissed a plea regarding Karnataka Legislative Council vote recounts, resulting in a seat win for the Congress.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W14</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Opposition unity challenges:</strong> While the Congress seeks to build a united front against the Delimitation Bill, the DMK has ruled out joining the party in this specific opposition effort.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google._?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivwFBVV95cUxNbG9uQkhhUDFqdXhDU3o1VXJBd2V5TGFIWnhoNzJtVkpfUTBhQVpSdDRMMTZyREpzWWg5LS0wOTlucHZMTE9oelZfNm5DcERiWnUyOFlzRkxRZTB4YXNzaXBYcWE4ZE5LemJXbDhvUHJwMVBBUmNZUEpQNDl5UTJaNlE3LTd2bTJCdzBzT0RqRmxlQjNtRUo4cFRJd3VBRTRDZkJxRzloZkcxQ2pGZ3hVdXhubWtMNXZRMVF3SUFtNA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
</ul>
